We, Delval Flow Controls Pvt. Ltd. hereby warranty the satisfactory
our products being supplied to you against above mentioned purchase
Warranty for the supplied product will be limited for a period of
date of commissioning or 18 months from the date of supply, whichever
For the bought out components, the respective manufacturer will cover
however we will provide all necessary assistance to the buyer.
In case of any product found faulty due to faulty materials,
M/s Delval Flow Controls Pvt. Ltd. will repair or replace it as its
of cost within the said warranty period. In such case our liability
the purchased product and we will not be any way liable for any direct
costs, expenses, damages to the properties, misuse of product and any
loss or production loss incurred by the purchaser.
This warranty will not be applicable
1. If the instructions or precautions mentioned in the IOM are not
2. In Case there is any improper handling of product.
